title: ANC - 6.-ANC is OFF and Transparency is OFF, both without selected values
scenario: Verify that when both ANC and Transparency modes are OFF, the Transparency toggle is disabled during a call with a popup message, and both modes remain OFF and functional after the call ends.
steps: Start/join a call (Zoom, Teams, Mobile) — ANC remains OFF, Transparency becomes greyed out/inaccessible.
Tap Transparency toggle — popup informs user option is unavailable during call.
Leave call — both ANC and Transparency remain OFF.
Tap ANC and Transparency toggles — user can switch between modes normally.
expected: When ANC Mode is OFF and Transparency Mode is OFF, during a call ANC stays OFF and Transparency is greyed out/inaccessible. Tapping Transparency shows a popup that the option is unavailable during a call. After leaving the call, both modes remain OFF and the user can switch between modes normally.
